title: The Imitation of Christ I: Counsels Useful for Spiritual Life
description: The most widely read devotional book after the Bible: vanity of vanities, all is vanity, except to love God and serve him alone.
introduction: The most widely read devotional book after the Bible: vanity of vanities, all is vanity, except to love God and serve him alone.

translation.text: Vanity of vanities, and all is vanity, except to love God and serve him alone.
